_comment: aimock fixtures for the deterministic OGUI routing test.
Single-turn: each pill message maps to the tool the agent must pick.
Guards BOTH boundary sides — curated pills must NOT route to generateSandboxedUi,
OGUI pills MUST. userMessage values are copied byte-for-byte from wrapper.tsx pill messages.

match.userMessage: Show me the spending trend over time.
Show me budget usage by policy — which ones are close to or over their limit?
Where is the money going? Break down spend by team.
Compare our income vs expenses — how is our cash flow?
Build a full spend report on the canvas: KPIs, the spending trend, budget usage, and a spend breakdown by team.
Build an interactive spend explorer I can filter and play with — pull the real transactions and policies.

arguments.jsFunctions: async function load(){ const t = await window.Websandbox.connection.remote.getTransactions(); document.getElementById('root').textContent = 'txns: ' + t.length; } load();

match.userMessage: Prototype an interactive what-if calculator for our cash flow using our real income and expense figures.

arguments.jsFunctions: async function load(){ const k = await window.Websandbox.connection.remote.getKpis(); document.getElementById('calc').textContent = 'spend: ' + k.totalSpend; } load();
